headline: Equinix Stock Rises 38.9% in Six Months: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: EQIX surges as AI-driven data exchange, hybrid multicloud demand and interconnection growth fuel recurring revenues, expansion and dividend support.

headline: UAE Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026-2031 Featuring Key DC Investors - Core42, du, Equinix, Gulf Data Hub, Khazna, Moro Hub, Pacific Controls, Pure Data Centres, XDS
summary: The UAE data center market is poised for significant expansion, with projections indicating an 18.82% CAGR from 2025 to 2031. Currently hosting 37 operational facilities across major cities such as Abu Dhabi and Dubai, the market continues to grow with 21 new centers planned. Investments in submarine cables bolster the UAE's digital economy, enhancing high-speed data and reducing latency. Retail colocation holds a 27% market share with a shift towards wholesale expected, reaching over 91% by 203

headline: Mexico Data Center Market Investment & Growth Report 2026-2031 Featuring Key DC Investors - AWS, Ascenty, Equinix, Google, HostDime, KIO, Mexico Telecom Partners, Microsoft, ODATA, Scala
summary: The Mexico data center market is projected to surge at a 19.32% CAGR from 2025 to 2031, powered by increasing AI, IoT, and big data adoption, and a burgeoning digital economy. The growth is fueled by expanding 5G networks, rising internet usage, and government initiatives. Noteworthy developments include the establishment of Latin America’s first HPC and AI center in Nuevo León, backed by NVIDIA, with $1 billion investment plans. headline: Jim Cramer Says Towns Should Demand 'Strict Adherence' From Big Tech Building Data Centers
summary: Jim Cramer urges towns to demand 'strict adherence' to pollution rules and extract value from neo-cloud hyperscaler data centers.
